name: Sat Payday Loans
description_short: ACE Cash Express operates 8 locations near Portsmouth, VA offering check cashing, money transfers, bill payment, and short-term installment loans up to $1,000.
description_long: ACE Cash Express is an established financial services provider with a network of physical locations throughout the Hampton Roads region of Virginia. The company has been operating multiple store locations in and around Portsmouth, including branches in Norfolk, Chesapeake, Virginia Beach, and Hampton, making it a regional presence for check-cashing and financial services. ACE's primary business centers on check cashing, money orders, bill payment services, and money transfers, complemented by short-term installment loans and prepaid card products. The company also offers banking services through partnerships with Pathward, N.A., including the Porte mobile banking app, Flare Account online banking, and the ACE Elite Visa prepaid debit card. ACE distinguishes itself through its in-person service model with physical store locations where customers can access services face-to-face, mobile banking integration, and a range of financial products designed for unbanked or underbanked consumers. The company appears to be part of a larger national chain, based on references to California notice requirements and multi-state operations. However, prospective customers should note that nearly all listed Portsmouth-area locations show as "Closed" on the website, suggesting potential operational challenges or store closures in the region, which significantly impacts accessibility for local consumers.
pros: 8 physical locations within 12.5 miles of Portsmouth for in-person service access
Multiple financial products in one location including check cashing, bill payment, money orders, and wire transfers
Installment loans available up to $1,000 with longer repayment terms than typical payday loans
Mobile banking app (Porte) with full-service features and in-person support
Prepaid debit card options (ACE Elite Visa, Flare Account) for managing money without traditional bank account
Money transfer services available at all locations
ATM access and tax services offered
cons: Nearly all Portsmouth-area locations display as "Closed" on website, severely limiting actual access to services
Website does not disclose fee structures, APR rates, or loan terms for installment loans
Limited loan amount ($100-$1,000) restricts usefulness for larger financial needs
Short-term loan products may trap consumers in high-cost debt cycles despite longer terms than payday loans
No information provided about credit reporting or how loans impact credit scores
best_for: Consumers without traditional bank accounts needing check cashing and money transfer services
Workers who need to cash paychecks quickly at physical locations
People seeking short-term installment loans under $1,000 with flexible repayment terms
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best suited for unbanked or underbanked consumers in the Hampton Roads area who need check cashing, money transfers, and bill payment services at physical locations. The critical caveat is that most Portsmouth-area locations appear to be permanently closed, making the company difficult or impossible to access for local residents despite the online listing suggesting active service.
services: Porte mobile banking account with app
ACE Elite Visa prepaid debit card
